Overview.title: MoveCar Dashboard
Overview.subtitle: Manage your parking tags, push channels, and scan history.

Tags.title: Parking Tags
Tags.subtitle: Each tag has its own QR code. Print and stick on your car.
Tags.empty: No tags yet. Create your first one.

Form.deleteConfirm: Delete this tag? Existing printed QRs will stop working.

Notifications.title: Push Channels
Notifications.subtitle: Choose how MoveCar reaches you when someone scans your tag.

bark.name: Bark (iOS)
bark.description: iOS native push. Paste your Bark device URL.

fcm.name: Web Push (FCM)
fcm.description: Desktop Chrome, Android Chrome, and other FCM-compatible browsers.

telegram.name: Telegram
telegram.description: Best for overseas users. Open the deep link and tap Start.
telegram.scanQr: or scan this QR in Telegram

email.name: Email
email.description: Fallback channel. Delivered to your account email.

History.title: Scan History
History.subtitle: Your recent notifications and their delivery state.
